passives.name: Reverberate
passives.effects: After 2 seconds from the start of the combat phase in each round, gain {{as|5 '''bonus''' health}} per {{as|1% '''bonus''' attack speed}}.

passives.name: Resonate
passives.effects: Basic attacks {{tip|on-hit}} deal {{as|10|magic damage}} {{as|(+ 2% of your '''bonus''' health)}} {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}.

passives.name: Rumble
passives.effects: {{tip|Immobilize|Immobilizing}} an enemy champion generates 25 stacks of ''Reverberation'' for 10 seconds, stacking up to 100 times and refreshing {{tip|on-hit}} as well as on subsequent immobilizations. At '''maximum''' stacks and upon {{tip|immobilize|immobilizing}} an enemy, your on-hit effects are applied to them 3 times.

effects_structured.raw: After 2 seconds from combat phase start, gain 5 bonus health per 1% bonus attack speed.
Basic attacks deal 10 (+2% bonus health) bonus magic damage on-hit.
Immobilizing an enemy champion grants 25 Reverberation stacks for 10 seconds, stacking up to 100 and refreshing on immobilizations.
At max stacks, immobilizing an enemy causes on-hit effects to apply 3 times.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model review: Reverberate applies once after combat-start timing gate, Resonate enhances each on-hit, and Rumble stack growth refreshes on qualifying crowd-control events.
Rumble semantics include both immobilize and ground events as stack triggers, with triple on-hit application only when at max stacks and a qualifying trigger occurs.
